title: Demographics of unemployed workers in Nevada

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

- Estimates of long-term unemployed labor force demographics in Nevada by sex, race, and Hispanic or Latino ethnicity, from November 2025 to the most recent known data.
- Estimates of unemployed labor force demographics in Nevada by sex, race, and Hispanic or Latino ethnicity, from November 2025 to the most recent known data.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Lynn Lazaro

To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Nevada Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Long-term unemployment (unemployed for 27 weeks or more) data in the state of Nevada from November 2025 to March 2026 or the most recent data. If you have percentages for each month, that would be preferred. If not, a total number of unemployed workers per month and a total number of long-term unemployed workers per month works fine.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Lynn Lazaro
